description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a tailored suit jacket and matching trousers. He wears a collared dress shirt with a striped necktie, and his shoes are classic and formal, complementing the professional look. The figure's arms are slightly extended outward, and his hands are relaxed, with fingers naturally spaced. His facial features are well-defined, and his hair is neatly styled, giving a polished appearance. The overall build is proportionate and realistic, with attention to anatomical detail. The clothing fits snugly, emphasizing a professional and composed demeanor suitable for urban environments.
description: A professionally dressed adult male in a business suit, collared shirt, and tie, standing with arms slightly outstretched. The figure has a neat hairstyle and formal shoes, presenting a polished, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit, tie, collared shirt, and facial features with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the suit, and the relaxed hand posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the suit's contour along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared dress shirt and necktie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
